rationale: Educ. Code §46.005 caps guaranteed state/local bond debt service amounts per project. The homestead exemption increase affects taxable values but does not alter the §46.005 cap formula or its operative terms.
quote: The guaranteed amount of state and local funds for a new project that a district may be awarded in any state fiscal biennium under Section 46.003 for a school district may not exceed the lesser of
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district debt service capacity is possible but does not modify the operative cap in §46.005.
